metadata.instruction: Find the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song on Chrome. Once you find the lyrics, save the webpage as a PDF so I can print it.
metadata.context: I want to print the lyrics to "Baby Shark" song.

l3.rationale: Launch Google Chrome from the app list.

l4.rationale: Launching Chrome from the app list and dismissing the restore prompt to reach the browser workspace.

l5.rationale: Initial browser/application navigation and closing setup screens to begin searching for the Baby Shark lyrics.

l5.rationale: Focused web search in the browser to find a page containing the Baby Shark song lyrics.
